debug_info.goal:
case none

α : Type u_4

inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
q : ENNReal
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple none q r
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[none] * ‖g‖_[q]

failed_attempts:
have : q = r := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    refine (dLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (dLpNorm_smul (‖f‖_[⊤] : ℝ) g).symm
    simp only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul, Pi.smul_apply, norm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg (dLpNorm_nonneg _)]
    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (norm_le_dLinftyNorm _ _) (norm_nonneg _)
